docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,558.36 FILED BY FARR, GINGER A AS TO DEFENDANT ESTRADA MALDONADO, MIGUEL ANGEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARR, GINGER A ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS NOT LISTED SERVED MAY-10-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ESTRADA MALDONADO, MIGUEL ANGEL

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. VISITNG JUDGE: CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF GINGER A FARR IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT MIGUEL ANGEL ESTRADA MALDONADO IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF
